steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: Before the blank is an independent clause (synthetic fibers are more durable). After it is another independent clause (manufacturing requires toxic chemicals).

steps.title: Apply the punctuation rule
steps.content: A comma with a coordinating conjunction joins two independent clauses: IC, but IC. Choices A and C omit the conjunction (creating comma splice or run-on), while B has the conjunction but omits the required comma. That matches choice D — D is correct.
